name: Ramen Noodles (Single Serving)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare noodles according to package directions.
2. Place the fried egg on top of the cooked noodles and cut into bite-sized pieces.
3. Crumble the fried sausage patties into the noodles.
4. Add diced green onions to the mixture and mix well.
5. Season with hot sauce, soy sauce (about 1 teaspoon), and Mrs. Dash to taste.
